title: Recycler
description: Recycler is a feature-rich economy plugin that transforms your server by adding a complete item recycling ecosystem.
body:
**Description**

Recycler is a feature-rich economy plugin that transforms your server by adding a complete item recycling ecosystem. Turn unwanted items into money with tiered chests, boosters, auto-recycling, and detailed statistics!

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0-blue)
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21+-green)

**🔄 Key Features**

- **Tiered Recycler Chests** - Four chest tiers with increasing rewards and unique visual effects
- **Boosters System** - Server-wide and player-specific boosts with scheduled "Happy Hours"
- **Auto-Recycling** - Configure items to be automatically recycled when picked up
- **Statistics & Leaderboards** - Track personal and global recycling data
- **Intuitive GUI** - Clean interface with real-time value calculations
- **Visual Effects** - Custom particles, holograms, and sound effects
- **Comprehensive Commands** - Full control for both players and admins
- **Granular Permissions** - Complete permission system for server customization

**💎 Recycler Chest Tiers**

- **Basic**: 1.0× value multiplier
- **Advanced**: 1.5× value multiplier, 5% bonus item chance
- **Elite**: 2.0× value multiplier, 10% bonus item chance
- **Ultimate**: 2.5× value multiplier, 15% bonus item chance

Each tier has its own unique appearance, particles, and hologram display to enhance your server's aesthetic!

**🚀 Boosters System**

Make recycling more exciting with timed boosters:

- **Player Boosters** - Give individual players recycling value boosts
- **Server Boosters** - Boost recycling values for everyone on the server
- **Happy Hours** - Schedule recurring boosted recycling periods
- **Booster Announcements** - Automatic countdown and activation messages

**📊 Statistics System**

Keep track of all recycling activity on your server:

- Personal and global recycling statistics
- Top recyclers leaderboards
- Most recycled items tracking
- Total money earned from recycling
- Detailed breakdowns of recycling activity

**🤖 Auto-Recycling**

Configure the plugin to automatically recycle specific items:

- Add/remove materials from auto-recycle list
- Toggle auto-recycling on/off
- Set specific items to be instantly recycled upon pickup
- Control which players have access to auto-recycling

**📜 Commands**

**Player Commands:**
```
/recycler open - Open the recycler interface
/recycler stats - View your recycling statistics
/recycler top [limit] - View top recyclers
/recycler boosters - View active and upcoming boosters
/recycler auto - Manage auto-recycling settings
/recycler values - View item recycle values
/recycler info - View plugin information
/recycler help - Show command help
```

**Admin Commands:**
```
/recycleradmin give <player> <tier> - Give a recycler chest to a player
/recycleradmin reload - Reload the configuration
/recycleradmin stats [player] - View player statistics
/recycleradmin globalstats - View global statistics
/recycleradmin booster player <player> <multiplier> <minutes> - Give player booster
/recycleradmin booster server <name> <multiplier> <minutes> - Create server booster
/recycleradmin help - Show admin command help
```

**⚙️ Permissions**

The plugin includes a complete permission system with granular control:

```
recycler.command - Use the main recycler command
recycler.command.open - Open recycler GUI from command
recycler.command.stats - View personal recycling statistics
recycler.command.top - View top recyclers
recycler.command.boosters - View active boosters
recycler.command.auto - Configure auto-recycling
recycler.command.values - View recycle values
recycler.use - Use recycler chests
recycler.break - Break recycler chests
recycler.gui.use - Use the recycler GUI
recycler.auto - Auto-recycle items
recycler.admin - Use admin commands
```

**💡 Configuration**

Easily configure the plugin to suit your server's economy:

- Custom value for every material
- Adjustable visual effects and messages
- Scheduled Happy Hours configuration
- Cooldown settings and statistics save intervals
- Control which items can be recycled and their values

**📦 Dependencies**

- **Vault**: Required for economy integration
- **Economy Plugin**: Any economy plugin compatible with Vault

**🏗️ Server Integration Ideas**

1. Create recycling centers with tiered chests for different player ranks
2. Design special recycling events during Happy Hours with increased activity
3. Use recycling statistics as part of a server achievement system
4. Create specialized shops for different tiers of recycler chests
5. Integrate auto-recycling permissions into your server's rank system

**🛠️ Installation**

1. Place the `Recycler.jar` file in your plugins folder
2. Restart your server
3. Configure the plugin settings in `plugins/Recycler/config.yml`
4. Enjoy a comprehensive recycling economy on your server!

**💝 Support Development**
If you find this plugin useful, consider:

1. Follow us in Modrinth
2. Rating the plugin
3. Sharing with other server owners

**For support:**

Join our Discord community - https://discord.gg/NJVHMSMR6m

Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community
